From: "Maren Calloway" <maren524@gmail.com>
Subject: Housekeeper
Date: Mon, 28 Jan 2008 19:12:24 GMT
To: dkiesq@aol.com

Hi Darren,

I wanted to get your opinion/approval on this; I know we're not really
hiring any new employees right now but this is a unique situation:

Maria Rosario (aka Katy) worked as a housekeeper here from 2006 until may
2007, when she left for an extended maternity leave.  The details of her
leave had been discussed prior to my start here, (and may even have been
discussed when she was originally hired) but as far as lance and I knew she
was leaving to have her baby and stay for a bit at her home in alaska, and
then would be returning to work sometime down the road.  She contacted me
recently and is interested in starting back up in February.

Although we don't currently need an extra housekeeper, Lance remembers her
as one of the best housekeepers on the team, and she was a big help to me in
the short time we worked together, surpassing some of the other current
housekeepers, and I would be interested in bringing her back since Ramona,
one of the laundry ladies, has plans to retire this year and we will need
help once she leaves.

I know the situation is tricky to start with, and i'm not sure of the VI
labor laws regarding maternity leave, but I would prefer to bring her back
rather than not.

Thank you
Maren

-- 
Maren Calloway
LSJ, LLC
6100 Red Hook Quarters, B-3
St. Thomas, USVI 00802
T: 340-775-8100  F:340-775-8108

I wanted to get your opinion/approval on this; I know we're not really hiring any new employees right now but this is a unique situation:

Maria Rosario (aka Katy) worked as a housekeeper here from 2006 until may 2007, when she left for an extended maternity leave.  The details of her leave had been discussed prior to my start here, (and may even have been discussed when she was originally hired) but as far as lance and I knew she was leaving to have her baby and stay for a bit at her home in alaska, and then would be returning to work sometime down the road.  She contacted me recently and is interested in starting back up in February. 

Although we don't currently need an extra housekeeper, Lance remembers her as one of the best housekeepers on the team, and she was a big help to me in the short time we worked together, surpassing some of the other current housekeepers, and I would be interested in bringing her back since Ramona, one of the laundry ladies, has plans to retire this year and we will need help once she leaves.
